options.name: --server
options.description: URL of the Atrius Digital Twins API [default: http://localhost:5143/]

options.name: --interactive
options.description: If true, do interactive (browser) authentication [default: False]

options.name: --visibility-scope
options.description: Visibility Scope Id to use. Note that AdminScope ID is 18f5abff-3082-4284-8886-f07fd990accf []
